relationships: Order belongs to one Customer
Order has many OrderItems
OrderItem references one Product
Order has one shipping Address
Order may have one Promotion applied
Order has many PaymentAttempts
Transaction has one source Account and one destination Account
Transaction has many LedgerEntries (double-entry bookkeeping)
LedgerEntry references one Currency
Transaction has many TransactionEvents (state transitions)
Transaction may reference one Merchant
Patient has many Encounters
Encounter involves one Practitioner
Encounter occurs at one Organization
Encounter has many Observations
Encounter may result in many Conditions
Condition may lead to many MedicationOrders
MedicationOrder references one Medication
Patient has many Consents
Tenant has many Users (via membership)
User can have many Roles within a Tenant
Role has many Permissions
Permission is scoped to a resource type and action
ResourcePolicy defines object-level access rules
Invitation belongs to Tenant and invites one User
All access changes are recorded in AuditLog
RouteOptimizationJob produces many Routes
Route is assigned to one Vehicle and one Driver
Route starts and ends at one Depot
Route has many ordered Stops
Stop has one TimeWindow constraint
Driver is assigned to one Vehicle per Route
RiskScore is computed for one Transaction
RiskScore references one ModelVersion
High-risk RiskScores may create one FraudCase
FraudCase may have many ReviewDecisions
Transaction may reference one DeviceFingerprint
RiskScore may be influenced by many RiskRules
Appointment references one AvailabilitySlot
AvailabilitySlot belongs to one Provider
Provider has many ProviderSchedules (recurring availability)
Appointment has one Patient and one Provider
Appointment may have one VideoSession
WaitlistEntry references one AvailabilitySlot type and one Patient
Customer has one active Subscription
Subscription references one Plan
MeteringEvent is emitted by Customer usage
UsageAggregate summarizes MeteringEvents per billing period
Invoice is generated per billing period for a Customer
Invoice has many LineItems (one per metered dimension)
Customer has one or more PaymentMethods
ReturnRequest references one Order
ReturnRequest has many ReturnLineItems
ReturnLineItem references one OrderItem
ReturnRequest may have one ShippingLabel
ReturnRequest may have one InspectionRecord after warehouse receipt
Approved ReturnRequest leads to one Refund
User has one current KycStatus
VerificationSession belongs to one User
VerificationSession has one DocumentCheck
VerificationSession has one LivenessCheck
VerificationSession has one AmlScreening
All KycStatus transitions are recorded as AuditEvents
AnalyticsEvent belongs to one User and one Session
Session belongs to one User and one Tenant
Funnel belongs to one Tenant and has ordered FunnelSteps
FunnelStep references an event name
CohortDefinition belongs to one Tenant and references entry events
Patient has many DeviceEnrollments
DeviceEnrollment references one Device
Device produces many VitalReadings
ThresholdRule belongs to one Patient and defines alert conditions
VitalReading may trigger one ClinicalAlert via ThresholdRule
ClinicalAlert may have one AlertResolution
Vehicle is assigned to one Driver per Trip
Trip has many ordered TelemetryPings
TelemetryPing records location, speed, and heading
GeofenceZone defines geographic boundaries
GeofenceEvent is triggered when a Vehicle enters or exits a GeofenceZone
User has many LinkedAccounts (via LinkSessions)
LinkSession references one Institution
LinkedAccount belongs to one Institution
LinkedAccount has one current AccountBalance
LinkedAccount has many Transactions
Transaction may have one TransactionCategory
Document is submitted as one ProcessingJob
ProcessingJob produces many Extractions
Extraction may identify many Clauses
Low-confidence Extractions are added to ReviewQueue
ReviewQueue item may have one ReviewDecision
ReviewDecision is made by one HumanReviewer
UserInteraction records one User's event with one Product
Recommendation is generated for one User from one ModelVersion
Recommendation contains many ordered ProductCatalogItems
RecommendationFeedback links one Recommendation to one User's click or purchase
Product has one current ProductCatalogItem (price, inventory status)
User has one or more Wallets per asset type
Wallet has many AssetBalances (one per token/network)
Transfer is initiated from one Wallet to an external address
Transfer requires one MpcSigningRequest
MpcSigningRequest is evaluated against one ApprovalPolicy
ApprovalPolicy requires one or more PolicyApprovals
All Wallet and Transfer operations are immutably recorded in AuditLog
User belongs to one or more Organizations
Organization may have one SsoConnection (SAML/OIDC)
User has many Sessions
User may have many MfaEnrollments (TOTP, WebAuthn)
User has many Roles within an Organization
Role has many Permissions
Session produces AccessTokens with Permission scope
EhrSystem has many SyncJobs (scheduled pulls)
SyncJob produces many FhirResources
InboundWebhook is received from one EhrSystem and produces FhirResources
FhirResource references one ResourceMapping (vendor format to FHIR R4)
FhirResource may have one DeduplicationRecord
Failed SyncJobs or webhook processing produce IntegrationErrors
OutboundShipment is assigned to one WarehouseSystem
OutboundShipment has many ShipmentItems
Each interaction with a WarehouseSystem creates one IntegrationMessage
Failed IntegrationMessages are moved to DeadLetterMessage for retry
WarehouseSystem sends FulfillmentEvents (picked, packed, shipped) for each OutboundShipment
InventorySnapshot is pulled from WarehouseSystem on scheduled sync
StockLevel tracks available units of one Sku at one Warehouse
Reservation holds units of one Sku at one Warehouse for a limited time
StockMovement records every change to StockLevel with reason and reference
PurchaseOrder belongs to one Supplier
PurchaseOrder has many PurchaseOrderLines
PurchaseOrderLine references one Sku
Report has one or more ReportVersions (draft, final, corrected)
ReportVersion has many ReportLineItems
ReportVersion that is submitted creates one SubmissionRecord
SubmissionRecord may receive one RegulatoryAcknowledgement
Each ReportVersion triggers one ReconciliationRun against source data
ReconciliationRun may produce many ReconciliationDiscrepancies
NotificationJob references one NotificationTemplate
NotificationJob targets one recipient User
NotificationJob has many DeliveryAttempts per NotificationChannel
User has one UserNotificationPreference (opt-in/out per channel)
Email/push DeliveryAttempt result is an InAppNotification if channel is in-app
ClinicalNote is processed by one NlpJob
NlpJob produces many ExtractedEntities
ExtractedEntity maps to one EntityConcept (ICD-10, SNOMED CT, RxNorm)
Low-confidence ExtractedEntities create ReviewFlags
ReviewFlag may be resolved with one FeedbackCorrection by a clinician
DispatchMessage is sent to one Driver from one dispatcher User
DispatchMessage may have many MessageAttachments
DispatchMessage may have one ReadReceipt from the Driver
PttSession has many PttParticipants (drivers and dispatchers)
Driver belongs to one DispatchZone for routing messages to correct dispatcher
Sku has one current PricePoint
PricePoint is calculated from one or more PricingRules
PricingRule may reference CompetitorPrices for a Sku
CompetitorPrice is sourced from one CompetitorSource
Every PricePoint change creates one PriceChangeAuditLog entry with applied rules
Recipient has one or more verified BankAccounts
PayoutRequest is made to one Recipient's BankAccount
PayoutRequests may be grouped into one PayoutBatch for rail processing
PayoutRequest has many PayoutEvents (submitted, processing, settled, failed)
Recipient may have one RecipientVerification record (micro-deposit or Plaid Verify)
Document has one active CollaborationRoom at a time
CollaborationRoom has many UserPresences (active collaborators)
Document has many DocumentVersions over time
Consecutive DocumentVersions have one VersionDiff (character-level changes with author attribution)
Document has many CommentThreads
CommentThread has many Comments
Sample is from one Patient and has one or more SequencingRuns
SequencingRun produces many VariantCalls
VariantCall is located within one Gene
Patient may have many Phenotypes (clinical observations)
Sample has one ConsentRecord defining permitted data uses
DataAccessRequest references one or more Samples and must be validated against ConsentRecords
SearchQuery returns many SearchResults
SearchResults are filtered by Facets and FacetValues
SearchQuery may be expanded using QuerySynonyms
Each SearchQuery generates one SearchAnalyticsEvent
SearchResult references one ProductIndex entry
Facet has many FacetValues available for a given search context
Entity relates to itself
Order has many Items
User has one Profile
A references B
B references C
C references A
